placement: [Planet] in [Sign] in [House] indicates [function] expressed through [style] in the area of [life topic].
house: The [House number] house concerns [topic]. Its cusp in [Sign] shows that this area is approached through [style]. Its ruler, [Planet], in the [House] house shows that these matters flow toward [life area].
final_synthesis: The chart emphasizes [themes], mainly shown by [evidence 1], [evidence 2], and [evidence 3].
